page_metadata.biotools__summary: Measuring the Intracranial Brain Volume With Fractal Dimension. The validation of the BrainFD software is based on T1-weighted MRI images from the Open Access Series of Imaging Studies (OASIS)-3 brain database, where each participant has multiple MRI scan sessions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Measuring the Intracranial Brain Volume With Fractal Dimension. The validation of the BrainFD software is based on T1-weighted MRI images from the Open Access Series of Imaging Studies (OASIS)-3 brain database, where each participant has multiple MRI scan sessions.
